reviews.comment:
Buenas estación de servicios. Es la bien centrica. Lo malo es el lugar para la carga, ya que es muy reducido y casi nunca estan habilitadas todas islas. La tienda Full no puedo opinar ya que nunca eh concurrido.

(Translated by Google)
Good gas station. It's very centrally located. The downside is the fueling area, as it's very small and almost all the pumps are never open. I can't comment on the convenience store since I've never been there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11544579934196333833/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRaXBIZ2NREAE

reviews.comment:
Es la más céntrica de las estaciones de servicio con un lindo serví compras. La atención es buena.
El problema es el espacio para cargar combustible que es escaso y muchas veces la fila llega a la calle y entorpece el tránsito.

(Translated by Google)
It's the most centrally located gas station with a nice shopping center. The service is good.
The problem is that there's limited space to fill up, and the line often stretches out onto the street and slows down traffic.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11544579934196333833/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3MXZuZlpBEAE
